2008.issue: [S2008] Version 6.2.2 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_GraphsTab/items/FlexGraphJSON" attribute "label" uses key "Configure template to create a data string to be used in graphs - e.g. ioBroker FlexCharts" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/README.md).

0063.issue: [W0063] "@types/sinon-chai, sinon-chai" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/hombach/ioBroker.tibberlink/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
